series_metadata.series_description: These files contain correspondence between the Ohio Division of Financial Institutions and the bank holding companies regarding affiliates of state-chartered banks and/or resulting from interstate bank acquisitions as provided in Ohio Revised Code Section 1101.05, including all material related to this correspondence.

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Retain microfilm in operating area as well as off-site storage facility for three (3) years, then destroy. ; Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area until imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked for quality and completeness, destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic files for three (3) years, then destroy., Microform: Shred ; Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
